mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_item, split_no, event_code, deal_flag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, remark, version
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from dbo.order_event_bus
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from dbo.order_event_bus
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.order_event_bus (id, order_id, order_item, split_no, event_code, deal_flag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, remark, version, params) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{eventCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dealFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{params,jdbcType=LONGNVARCHAR})

insert into dbo.order_event_bus
id,
order_id,
order_item,
split_no,
event_code,
deal_flag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,
remark,
version,
params,

mapper.update:
update dbo.order_event_bus
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
event_code = #{record.eventCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deal_flag = #{record.dealFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
params = #{record.params,jdbcType=LONGNVARCHAR},

update dbo.order_event_bus set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, event_code = #{record.eventCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deal_flag = #{record.dealFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, params = #{record.params,jdbcType=LONGNVARCHAR}

update dbo.order_event_bus set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, event_code = #{record.eventCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deal_flag = #{record.dealFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.order_event_bus
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
event_code = #{eventCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deal_flag = #{dealFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT},
params = #{params,jdbcType=LONGNVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.order_event_bus set order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, event_code = #{eventCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deal_flag = #{dealFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}, params = #{params,jdbcType=LONGNVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
